---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 😯 Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13, Windows 11]
- **NATS Server Version**: [e.g. 2.10.1]
- **nats-horizon Version**: [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash]
- **Installation Method**: [Docker / Binary / Kubernetes / Source]
- **Browser** (if UI issue): [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

- Related Issues: #[issue number]
- Related PRs: #[PR number]

## 🩺 Logs

If applicable, paste relevant logs here.

```
Paste logs here
```
